meta_title: For Freelancers: user onboarding to Solve no marketing skills (Intermediate Comparison)
meta_description: Learn how to user onboarding and overcome no marketing skills. A Intermediate-level Comparison using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: User Onboarding to Fix No Marketing Skills
content.seo_description: Learn how to use AI-driven onboarding to solve the 'no marketing skills' problem. A high-level guide for freelancers using Antigravity and Claude Code.
content.answer_block: If you lack marketing skills, stop trying to 'market' and start building automated user onboarding. By engineering a high-value first-run experience, you transform your product into its own growth engine. Use Antigravity to structure the logic and Claude Code to iterate the implementation, turning cold signups into loyal, paying clients.
content.intro:
The cold reality of freelancing is that your code might be flawless, but your product dies in the silence of a user who doesn't understand its value. You aren't a marketer, and you shouldn't have to be. The gap between a user landing on your dashboard and actually using it is where most SaaS projects go to wither.

Relief arrives when you stop chasing leads and start engineering a frictionless onboarding flow. By automating the 'Aha!' moment through data-driven design, you turn your application into a self-selling machine. This isn't just about tooltips; it's about architecting a journey that proves your value before the user even considers churn.

steps.title: Define the 'Aha!' Moment
steps.description: Identify the one action that provides instant value to your client. We will build the onboarding flow to force this action.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze my current SaaS codebase and identify the core functional path that leads to user retention. Output a JSON schema for a 3-step interactive onboarding walkthrough that guides users to this path.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'Generate a schema for user onboarding based on the core feature path identified.'

steps.title: Architecting the Onboarding State Machine
steps.description: Use a state machine to track onboarding progress so users can resume exactly where they left off.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a React state machine hook for an onboarding flow that persists progress in local storage and triggers specific UI highlights based on the current step.
steps.claude_code_command: claude add --path './src/hooks/useOnboarding.ts' --prompt 'Implement the state machine logic generated by Antigravity.'

steps.title: Injection of Contextual Tooltips
steps.description: Implement non-intrusive, context-aware tooltips that appear only when the user reaches the relevant UI element.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a reusable React component for onboarding tooltips that uses Framer Motion for entrance animations and detects viewport visibility.
steps.claude_code_command: claude fix --file './src/components/Tooltip.tsx' --instruction 'Add Framer Motion entrance animations and ensure accessibility compliance.'

steps.title: Data-Driven Progress Tracking
steps.description: Capture onboarding completion rates to identify where users are dropping off in your flow.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a tracking utility that logs onboarding step completion to a Supabase table, including time spent per step.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'Create a logging utility that connects to Supabase to track onboarding analytics.'

steps.title: Final Integration and Polish
steps.description: Review the entire flow and ensure the transition between onboarding and the live application is seamless.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Review the integrated onboarding flow for race conditions or UI blocking issues. Suggest a CSS override to ensure tooltips appear above all z-index layers.
steps.claude_code_command: claude review --path './src/onboarding/' --instruction 'Check for z-index conflicts and ensure smooth state transitions.'

pro_tips: Always gate your onboarding behind a 'Skip' button; forcing users creates resentment, not retention.
Use micro-copy that focuses on the user's benefit, not the feature's name; say 'Save time' instead of 'Use Automation Module'.
Integrate a 'Reset Onboarding' button in the settings menu; power users often want to re-watch the tutorial after a major UI update.
Trigger the onboarding flow based on inactivity or specific event triggers rather than just 'on-load' to reduce cognitive load.
Treat your onboarding code as a separate module; it should be easily detachable for future A/B testing cycles.
content.next_steps: Once your onboarding flow is live, monitor the completion rates via your analytics dashboard. Use the data to refine the copy in the tooltips that show the highest drop-off rates.
content.conversion_block: Stop fighting for attention and start engineering results. By implementing a high-converting onboarding flow, you provide professional value that keeps clients coming back. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
